seoTitle: Callide vs Caloundra — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Callide and Caloundra. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Callide and Caloundra.
heading: Callide vs Caloundra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Callide, Queensland and Caloundra, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Callide has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Caloundra (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Callide or Caloundra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Callide has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Caloundra scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Callide scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Caloundra scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Callide or Caloundra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Callide has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.93% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
